steps.title: Connect the opening phrase
steps.content: The opening phrase identifies recordings of brain activity. The sentence should then say what those recordings, or electrograms, show about skilled soccer players.

steps.title: Keep electrograms as subject
steps.content: The version with electrograms as the subject cleanly reports that the recordings show increased activity. B makes soccer players the subject, while C and D make responses the subject, weakening the sentence's logic. The answer is A.
